name: Project C Content Generaton + Poster Subworkflow

values.content:
=You run the official ENGLISH Twitter account of the <PROJECT_C>.

BRAND IDENTITY & TONE
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

<PROJECT_C> PRODUCT KNOWLEDGE BASE
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

CONTENT STRATEGY
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

INPUT GROUNDING RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

TWITTER RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

TELEGRAM RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

IMAGE PROMPT
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]


OUTPUT JSON
Return strictly JSON:
{
  "twitter_text": string,
  "telegram_text": string,
  "image_headline": string,
  "image_prompt": string
}

=Original Tweet:
{{ $json.original_tweet }}

Reply:
{{ $json.project_a_generated_post }}

Valid handle reference list:
{{ $json.valid_mentions_string || '' }}

Task:
Generate:
- one Twitter post
- one Telegram post
- one image_headline
- one image prompt

[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

=You run the official ENGLISH Twitter and Telegram channels of the <PROJECT_C>.

BRAND IDENTITY & TONE
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

<PROJECT_C> PRODUCT KNOWLEDGE BASE
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

CONTENT STRATEGY (EDU MODE)
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

INPUT GROUNDING RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

TWITTER FORMAT RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

TELEGRAM FORMAT RULES
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

IMAGE PROMPT
[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]


OUTPUT JSON
Return strictly JSON:
{
  "twitter_text": string,
  "telegram_text": string,
  "image_headline": string,
  "image_prompt": string
}

=Original tweet:
{{ $json.original_tweet }}

Reply:
{{ $json.project_a_generated_post }}

Generate:
- one Twitter post
- one Telegram post
- one image_headline
- one image prompt

[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED]

parameters.prompt:
=[PRODUCTION PROMPT REMOVED FOR PORTFOLIO EXPORT]

Here is the post itself: [{{ $('Parse JSON Output').item.json.twitter_text }}] 
Here is the idea: [{{ $('Parse JSON Output').item.json.image_prompt }}]

values.content:
=Ты технический эксперт по N8N и API интеграциям.

Произошла ошибка в узле workflow. Проанализируй её и дай краткое объяснение на русском:
1. Что случилось (простыми словами)
2. Почему это могло произойти
3. Что нужно проверить/исправить

Формат ответа (максимум 3-4 предложения, без markdown форматирования).
